reference: I am writing from India. I have been suffering from asthma since the 1980s, but it was under control with the usual medications. I had tuberculosis last year and took anti-tuberculosis medications for one full year. Now the tuberculosis has gone, but I have bronchiectasis. If I take antibiotics, I have stomach problems. What should I do?
text: I am writing from India. I have been suffering from asthma since the 1980s, but it was under control with the usual medications. I had tuberculosis last year and took anti-tuberculosis medications for one full year. Now the tuberculosis has gone, but I have bronchiectasis. If I take antibiotics, I have stomach problems. What should I do?
